copy_text: Digital tools for tenant organising, campaigning and collective action.
TenantShout helps tenants map problems, connect with neighbours, and coordinate campaigns. It is built for practical organising on the ground.
A practical toolkit to help tenants research, coordinate and act together.
A Living Rent platform for digital campaign actions to mobilise members.
Submit objections to new STL applications.
A calling and organising workspace for member outreach.
Filter and search housing tribunal decisions.
A platform for complaining to Edinburgh Council.
Reachout gives organisers a focused workspace for contact lists, calls, notes, and campaign follow-up, so outreach stays coordinated.
Keep campaign teams aligned in one place
The Tenant Complaints Portal helps tenants gather shared evidence and coordinate complaints to Edinburgh Council with more impact.
TenantAct is built and maintained by volunteers. Help us build tools, test ideas, and support campaigns.
Built be members of Living Rent, Scotland's tenants' and community union
